name: Golden Pork Roast
recipeIngredient: 4 pounds pork loin, rib end, R-T-C
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the roast fat side up on a rack in a foil-lined roasting pan.
2. Mix together the remaining ingredients and brush the mixture onto all sides of the roast.
3. Roast in a 325°F oven for about 2 1/2 hours. Brush with the honey mixture several times during roasting.
